reviews.comment:
Malicima la atención una hora y media para atenderme con 9 autos adelante es una tortura cargar Nafta en ese lugar

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible; it took an hour and a half to get served with nine cars ahead of me. Getting gas at that place is torture.

reviews.comment:
Por favor, pongan empleados que atiendan la estación de servicios. Somos decenas de viajeros parando aquí y no puede atender una sola persona a toda la demanda.
La ventaja de salir temprano uno se la  pierde aquí esperan media hora para una carga.
Modernicen las cosas en Santiago del Estero.

(Translated by Google)
Please hire staff for the gas station. Dozens of travelers stop here, and one person can't handle the demand. The advantage of leaving early is lost here; people wait half an hour to fill up. Modernize things in Santiago del Estero.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaXzRIZER3EAE
